title: Key events for Australian shareholders 2013-14
description: Contains links to documents about large company transactions which may impact a large number of Individual taxpayers.
keywords: Key events, key events, key events affecting Australian shareholders, events, events affecting shareholders

content_blocks.text: Introduction
This document contains links to documents about events affecting listed investments (shares, units and stapled securities) where a significant number of investors may be impacted.
Key events
View shareholder information on demergers

Demerger of Recall Holdings Limited by Brambles Limited – A fact sheet on the tax consequences for current and/or former shareholders in Brambles Limited (Brambles) after the demerger of Recall Holdings Limited (Recall).
CR 2013/57 Income tax: return of share capital: Ridley Corporation Limited
CR 2013/58 Income tax: scrip for scrip: exchange of options in Bathurst Resources Limited for options in NZ NewCo
CR 2013/61 Income tax: scrip for scrip roll-over: acquisition of Diversified Utility and Energy Trust No. 3 by Diversified Utility and Energy Trust No. 2
CR 2013/62 Income tax: exchange of shares in DUET Management Company 1 Limited for shares in DUET Company Limited
CR 2013/63 Income tax: exchange of units in Diversified Utility and Energy Trust No. 1 for shares in DUET Company Limited
CR 2013/69 Income tax: Return of capital: Wesfarmers Limited
CR 2013/80 Income tax: scrip for scrip roll-over: proposed merger and acquisition of units in RFM Chicken Income Fund
CR 2013/81 Income tax: scrip for scrip roll-over: proposed merger and acquisition of units in RFM Australian Wine Fund
CR 2013/82 Income tax: Stockland Group - Capital Reallocation
CR 2013/94 Income tax: CSG Limited - further return of capital
CR 2013/95 Income tax: The Trust Company Limited Scheme of Arrangement and Special Dividend
CR 2013/99 Income tax: Village Roadshow Limited - return of capital
CR 2013/102 Income tax: Sydney Airport Trust 2 - interposing a new head company
CR 2014/4 Income tax: Clough Limited Scheme of Arrangement and Special Dividend
CR 2014/8 Income tax: demerger of McAleese Limited by TTG Pty Ltd
CR 2014/9 Income tax: Mirvac Group - capital reallocation
CR 2014/10 Income tax: share consolidation and in specie distribution: Macquarie Group Limited
CR 2014/11 Income tax: demerger of Orora Limited by Amcor Limited
CR 2014/12 Income tax: demerger of Recall Holdings Limited by Brambles Limited
CR 2014/22 Income tax: Australia and New Zealand Banking Group Limited - ANZ Capital Notes 2
CR 2014/25 Income tax: Melbourne IT Ltd - return of capital
CR 2014/28 Income tax: GDI Property Group - creating a new stapled security
CR 2014/31 Income tax: return of share capital: Iron Mountain Mining Limited
CR 2014/36 Income tax: CFS Retail Property Trust Group stapled security - units in CFS Retail Property Trust 2 replaced by shares in CFX Co Limited
CR 2014/40 Income tax: issue of convertible preference shares (CPS3) by Suncorp Group Limited
CR 2014/41 Income tax: Aviva Corporation Limited: return of capital
CR 2014/42 Income tax: scrip for scrip: exchange of shares in Envestra for APA stapled securities

content_text:
## Introduction
This document contains links to documents about events affecting listed investments (shares, units and stapled securities) where a significant number of investors may be impacted.
### Key events
View shareholder information on demergers
Demerger of Recall Holdings Limited by Brambles Limited – A fact sheet on the tax consequences for current and/or former shareholders in Brambles Limited (Brambles) after the demerger of Recall Holdings Limited (Recall).

CR 2013/62 Income tax: exchange of shares in DUET Management Company 1 Limited for shares in DUET Company Limited
CR 2013/63 Income tax: exchange of units in Diversified Utility and Energy Trust No. 1 for shares in DUET Company Limited

CR 2013/80 Income tax: scrip for scrip roll-over: proposed merger and acquisition of units in RFM Chicken Income Fund
